title: cheilanthes fragrans
intro: Cheilanthes fragrans, also known as the Fragrant Rattlesnake Fern, is a species of fern native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Cheilanthes fragrans include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Cheilanthes fragrans can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use, and is also used in traditional folk medicine in many parts of Asia.
